desc: PlantroomAddBoilersToRoomByPresetCommand — quick-build "N boilers + pumps + buffer" delegating to the canonical solver pipeline.
summary: PlantroomAddBoilersToRoomByPresetCommand — quick-build "N boilers + pumps + buffer" delegating to the canonical solver pipeline.
usecase: Ribbon quick-build for a new plantroom.
precondition: Resolver fields set; preset valid; room dims positive.
logictree:
1) Validate resolvers.
2) Build manifest + run PositionBoilers via V2 service (records solver_runs).
3) Stage placements via LayoutSolvePlantroomEquipmentWithPresetCommand (re-run with same manifest for staging).
4) Emit change_id + placements_staged.
